title: Flamethrower
description: Adds a new aerosol can item that can be used with flint and steel as a flamethrower!
body:
![Player using an aerosol can with a flint and steel on a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a22355fbd8b410cc0c67b125cdff288bd0a27dbe.png)

# Flamethrower

This project adds a new item to game, the aerosol can! Together with a flint and steel, you can use it as a flamethrower and burn down anything with ease!

![Crafting recipe of an aerosol can](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/041e8b89363b4e067c3d4024988347c175891272.png)

- To **craft** the aerosol can, place 6 irons ingots in a ring excluding the top corners, add a stone or blackstone button in the top left corner and add a tripwire to the right corner.
- To **use** it as a flamethrower, hold it in your main hand with a flint and steel in your offhand and hold right click.
- Be careful though, the **durability** of both the aerosol can and the flint and steel will decrease quickly when using the flamethrower.
- The flamethrower covers all blocks in a wide range with **fire** and also **damages** mobs and players.

When installing this as a datapack, it is accompanied by a resource pack. Make sure you download and enable that too!
